info.description: Public API's to get, create and manage formulated products and related information.
info.title: Formulated Product Web Services.

get.summary: Displays the list of Formulated Products from indexed search.
get.description: Displays the list of formulated products, including both the formulated products and their specialized subtypes. For improved performance and refinement, use the $searchStr query parameter to define search criteria. By default, the API returns 50 items, with the option to increase up to 1000 using the $top parameter.

parameters.name: $searchStr
parameters.description:
Provide a 3DEXPERIENCE search expression with a minimum of two characters.
Note that this will run on indexed data only. For example,
1.searchStr="FRM" OR (modified>"2021-09-01T00:00:00Z" AND modified<"2021-09-23T00:00:00Z")
2.searchStr="FRM" AND modified<"2019-03-19T08:00:00.000Z"

parameters.name: $mask
parameters.description: Mask defines what data is to be returned by default Mask is:dsfrm:FormulatedProduct.Default

parameters.name: $fields
parameters.description: You can add several fields with the comma (,) separator to get in the response.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned from the search. This feild accepts a maximum value of 1000.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with the $top query parameter)

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be recognised by the server due to incorrect syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request is required user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once,the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response.Since the response entity might be included the relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication.

500.description: INTERNAL SERVER ERROR. A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: csrf token. You can get it from 3DSpace/resources/v1/application/CSRF

get.summary: Displays the Formula Ingredient details of a Formulated Product.
get.description: Retrieve all the Formula Ingredient connection details. If a raw material or Formulated Product with weight units enabled and used as a child ingredient, the Quantity(inputUnit,min, max,and target) details will be retrieved. Otherwise, the Quantity(min, max,and target) details will be retrieved in terms of percentage.

parameters.name: ID
parameters.description: The id of the formulated product for which Formula Ingredient connections need to be retrived.

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: csrf token. You can get it from 3DSpace/resources/v1/application/CSRF

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be recognised by the server due to incorrect syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request is required user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once,the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response.Since the response entity might be included the relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication.

500.description: INTERNAL SERVER ERROR. A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

get.summary: Displays Formula Ingredient connection details based on the provided connection ID.
get.description: Displays the Formula Ingredient connection details based on provided connection id. If a raw material or Formulated Product with weight units enabled and used as a child ingredient, the Quantity(inputUnit,min, max,and target) details will be retrieved. Otherwise, the Quantity(min, max,and target) details will be retrieved in terms of percentage.

parameters.name: ID
parameters.description: The id of the formulated product for which Formula Ingredient connections need to be retrived.

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: csrf token. You can get it from 3DSpace/resources/v1/application/CSRF

parameters.name: ConID
parameters.description: ID of the Formula Ingredient Connection.
